mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kpi_record WHERE kpi_id = #{kpiId} AND recorded_date = #{date}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kpi_record (kpi_id, actual_value, boolean_value, recorded_date, note, owner_id, created_at) VALUES (#{kpiId}, #{actualValue}, #{booleanValue}, #{recordedDate}, #{note}, #{ownerId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kpi_record ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kpi_record (id, kpi_id, actual_value, boolean_value, recorded_date, note, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{kpiId}, #{actualValue}, #{booleanValue}, #{recordedDate}, #{note}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP))
